summary: Post-refactor regression testing (ChatMaroc.jsx split into ChatHeader/WelcomeScreen/MessageList/ChatComposer + useTextToSpeech hook; backend build_system_message() helper extraction). Backend: 32/32 pytest cases PASS including the 3 refactored endpoints (/api/chat, /api/chat-with-file, /api/web-search-chat). Frontend: full Playwright sweep at 1440x900 covering all data-testids in the review request — every flow passes (text streaming, welcome screen hide/show, cyber background, web search toggle+chip, voice selector w/ 7 options, auto-speak toggle, sign-language modal open/close, share modal + public /share/:token render, PDF export download, rename + delete conversation, settings modal). No console errors. No regressions detected from the refactor.

refactored_endpoints./api/chat-with-file: PASS (txt summary, png vision, unsupported -> 415, empty -> 400, kind=file persisted)
refactored_endpoints./api/web-search-chat: PASS (sources event, deltas, [n] citations, sources persisted on assistant msg)

backend_pytest.other: languages(8), conversations CRUD, messages list/clear, sign-language mock, transcribe reachable, TTS (mp3 header), settings get/put + clamps, admin cleanup, share/unshare/shared flow incl. idempotent share token

frontend_ui.welcome_screen: PASS (emblem visible on fresh chat, hidden after messages)
frontend_ui.cyber_background: PASS (data-testid app-background on both main and shared pages)
frontend_ui.web_search_toggle: PASS (search-mode-chip 'Web search on' appears on toggle, removed on second toggle)
frontend_ui.settings_modal: PASS (settings-button opens settings-modal; settings-close-button closes it)
frontend_ui.rename_flow: PASS (rename-conversation-btn -> rename-input -> rename-confirm updates sidebar title)
frontend_ui.delete_flow: PASS (delete-conversation-btn removes item and shows 'Conversation deleted' toast)
frontend_ui.share_flow: PASS (share-modal opens with share-url-input populated, public /share/:token renders shared-messages with cyber background + 2 child message rows)

critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: ChatMaroc.jsx is now ~520 lines, components are well-scoped, and the new useTextToSpeech hook owns its own state (speakingId/ttsLoadingId).

Backend build_system_message() helper successfully de-duplicates the SYSTEM_PROMPT + language label + extra + history assembly across /api/chat, /api/chat-with-file, /api/web-search-chat. All three endpoints verified to still produce language-aware SSE streams.
The new SSE parser in consumeStream() correctly wraps JSON.parse in try/catch and skips malformed chunks instead of aborting — good resilience improvement.

Minor: test file /app/backend/tests/test_chatmaroc_api.py has a hardcoded fallback URL (line 10) that violates the env-only rule — non-blocking since REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is always set, but worth tightening to fail-fast.

Minor: server.py logger is defined at line 612 but referenced inside functions earlier (e.g. tavily_search via touch_conversation cascade and transliterate_for_tts at line 209). Python late-binding makes this work at runtime, but moving logging.basicConfig + logger above first use would be cleaner.
test_credentials: N/A (no auth in this app; clientId auto-generated in localStorage)
seed_data_creation: Test sessions and conversations are created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up by pytest teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor regression complete. If main agent makes further UI changes, note that data-testid naming uses '-button' suffix in some places (settings-close-button, share-close-button, sign-language-close-button) and not '-close'. history-item uses exact testid 'history-item' (no per-id suffix). Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_chatmaroc_api.py is the source of truth for API regression and runs in ~51s.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. Refactor produced no regressions in any of the 14 review-request bullets.
